spec.globalPrompt: Create one photorealistic cinematic scene image for a modern web novel. Keep the style consistent with the title, character, and background assets. Use realistic anatomy, realistic materials, grounded faces, and live-action-like lighting.
spec.globalNegativePrompt: anime, manga, cel shading, cartoon, text, readable letters, chapter labels, talk labels, section labels, subtitles, captions, logo, watermark, UI overlay, collage, split panel, multiple moments in one frame, deformed anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate body parts, malformed hands
spec.promptSuffix: For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay small, hidden, and never read as a companion. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain a smaller unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, and not making eye contact with Sera. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.

characters.name: サトー
characters.visualRules: Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, a lean athletic build, and tasteful American casual clothing. Do not turn him into a young clean-shaven hero.

characters.name: セラ
characters.visualRules: Keep her in a faithful classic maid dress with cat ears, silver-gray hair, and golden eyes. Civilian disguises may layer over the maid silhouette, but do not turn the outfit into armor or a combat suit. Hidden tools may subtly peek from sleeves, apron, garter, or skirt folds, but the first impression must remain a proper maid.

continuityNotes: This is the Sato-part of the same departure-platform incident as scene-001-001-001-sera.
Keep the same morning platform, same limited express boarding door, same tote bag, and same station light in both images.
Sera may appear only as a tiny hidden worker silhouette.
If Sera appears, she must be far behind Sato and clearly human-scale, not enlarged, not near his shoulder line, and not visually competing with him.
scene-001-001-001-sato.promptSuffix: Compose a calm major-station departure scene with Sato dominant near the boarding area of a fictional mountain limited express. He should clearly feel alone and mildly pleased about the trip. If Sera appears at all, keep her tiny, far in the background, and partially hidden near cleaning equipment, pillars, or platform shadows. She must read as a distant station worker, never as an oversized figure directly behind Sato.
scene-001-001-001-sato.negativePrompt: Do not place Sera beside Sato as a partner or companion. Do not turn the scene into action. Do not make Sera too large, too close, or near the same depth plane as Sato.

continuityNotes: This is the Sera-part of the same departure-platform incident as scene-001-001-001-sato.
Keep the same train, same platform geometry, and same morning light as the paired image.
Sato must remain a smaller unaware traveler near the boarding door.
scene-001-001-001-sera.promptSuffix: Create a covert station-platform action image with Sera dominant in a cleaning-staff disguise, disabling a saboteur near a control box or service area. Keep Sato smaller in the background, simply preparing to board and unaware. The attacker must be a distinct station infiltrator who clearly does not look like Sato.
scene-001-001-001-sera.negativePrompt: Do not show Sato fighting, helping, or reacting. Do not let the attacker resemble Sato.

continuityNotes: This is the Sato-part of the same train-car incident as scene-001-001-002-sera.
Keep the same window seat, same carriage palette, and same service cart continuity in both images.
Sera should read as staff if visible.
scene-001-001-002-sato.promptSuffix: Show a refined limited express carriage with Sato dominant at the window seat enjoying the ride and accepting service. If Sera appears, keep her as a smaller attendant with a cart in the aisle, never as a companion seated with him.
scene-001-001-002-sato.negativePrompt: Do not stage Sato and Sera as a pair. Do not make the carriage feel like a battlefield.

continuityNotes: This is the Sera-part of the same train-car incident as scene-001-001-002-sato.

scene-001-001-002-sera.promptSuffix: Create a train-interior covert-action image with Sera dominant as a sales attendant, using the service cart to interrupt and neutralize an attacker in the aisle. Keep Sato smaller in the background at the same window seat, relaxed and unaware. The attacker must be a distinct passenger or infiltrator who clearly does not resemble Sato.
scene-001-001-002-sera.negativePrompt: Do not show Sato standing up to fight. Do not let the attacker resemble Sato.

scene-001-002-001-sato.negativePrompt: Do not make Sato look alarmed or combat-ready.
